description: A new product is being run for the first time. A quality inspector must perform a First Article Inspection (FAI) to validate the production process.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the engineering drawings and all specifications for the new product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all technical documentation required for the FAI.

nodes.task_description: Measure every dimension on the first part produced and record it against the drawing specifications.

expected_outcome.value: Inspector performs the detailed measurements and enters them into the FAI report form.

nodes.task_description: Submit the completed FAI report for engineering approval before authorizing the full production run.

expected_outcome.value: Agent submits the report, and production is held pending approval.
